title: Block Diagram Protocol Schema
description: This schema is used to validate the JSON file that is used to store the block diagram protocol. There are two components, a toolbox which describes the abstract blocks and spaces and the model which has the actual instances of the toolbox - processors, wires and systems.

Toolbox.description: A toolbox of abstract blocks and spaces.
Toolbox.title: Toolbox

Model.description: A model of the instances of processors, wires and systems.
Model.title: Model
